name: skills-sync
description: Sync Claude Code skills with GitHub repository
prompt:
Sync Claude Code skills with Git repository.

Action: {{action}}
- pull: Pull latest changes from GitHub
- push: Commit and push local changes to GitHub
- status: Show git status
- setup: Initialize git repository and setup sync

Commit message (for push): {{message}}

This skill helps maintain a synchronized collection of skills across multiple machines using Git.
author: Claude Code User

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Action to perform: pull, push, status, or setup
